name: context_backlinks
description: Find which shared-context records depend on this one.

name: context_browse
description: Survey the shared team context so you know what the team already relies on.

name: context_delete
description: Remove a shared-context record that no longer reflects the team's direction.

name: context_link
description: Relate two shared-context records so the team can navigate between them.

name: context_read
description: Read a shared-context record by its exact location before you act on it.

name: context_search
description: Search the shared team context by keyword; read it before acting.

name: context_write
description: Write a record to the shared team context: key decisions, conventions, and direction the team relies on. Update it when direction changes.
